← All Tours · 2-Day Tour — Son-Kul Express
2 Days

Son-Kul Express

Kyzart → Son-Kul Lake (Ozbek Pass 3,400 m) → Kyzart

D1

Kyzart → Son-Kul Lake

After breakfast (or on arrival), ride up to Ozbek Pass (3,400 m) and descend into the Son-Kul basin. Free afternoon at the lakeshore. Dinner and overnight in a yurt.

🐎 ~5–5.5 hours 🍽 Lunch + Dinner 🏕 Yurt overnight
D2

Son-Kul Lake → Kyzart

Breakfast at 08:00. Short lakeshore ride, then return via Ozbek Pass. Big farewell lunch in Kyzart (two dishes + salad). Transfer to Bishkek after lunch.

🐎 ~3–4 hours · 18 km 🍽 Breakfast + Lunch 🚗 Return Bishkek

Option A — Same day start Arrive in Kyzart by 11:00. Have lunch together, then depart around 12:00–13:00.
Option B — Arrive the night before Rest and start fresh in the morning with breakfast. Overnight + dinner: 24 € / person (not included).
